title: Minky VT86890F01 Pod Plus 24 Sure Grip Pegs, Grey, One Size
features: Sure grip clip - Attaches to washing line
Clear lid to secure pegs inside
description: From the manufacturer Minky Homecare Established in the UK in 1941, Minky Homecare are world leaders in laundry hardware and textile manufacture. Minky is the UK’s leading brand in the laundry market, with Minky ironing boards and covers found in over 70% of UK homes. We are the proud holders of both the Royal Warrant, granted as supplier of premium quality products to the Royal Household, and the Princes Warrant, awarded for product excellence and a commitment to the environment. Minky Sure Grip Peg Pod With 24 Minky Sure Grip Pegs Keep your pegs within handy reach with the Sure Grip Peg Pod! As part of the new Sure Grip range, this durable peg pod features a Sure Grip clip that securely attaches to your washing line. Weatherproof This all weatherproof peg pod features drainage holes and a lid to shelter your Sure Grip pegs from the weather, ensuring they last longer and keep them altogether. The peg pod also includes 24 Minky Sure Grip pegs. Features: Ideal peg storage pod for your washing line Includes 24 Minky Sure Grip Pegs Sure Grip clip securely attaches pod to a washing line Clear lid to secure pegs inside Durable and weatherproof material Drainage holes Waterproof clear lid Comes with 24 Minky Sure Grip Pegs Clips securely to washing line
